Llm.//: Local E2E sample: RiskAndIssue/Narrative/Review on OpenAI (cheapest tier), Challenge on Anthropic Haiku (cheapest Claude). The three OpenAI agents inherit Default; only Challenge overrides. ApiKeys are NOT committed — set per provider via env or dotnet user-secrets (Llm__Default__ApiKey for OpenAI, Llm__Agents__Challenge__ApiKey for Anthropic). Applies only when ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development; the committed appsettings.json default stays 'fake' for the no-key demo. NOTE: the 'openai' adapter is still a stub (issue #27 follow-up) — OpenAI-routed agents boot but throw NotImplementedException on first call.
